title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on traditions, identity and globalisation.

questions.question: Do you think globalisation is eroding cultural traditions and local identities, or is it creating new and richer cultural forms?
How do you think communities can balance preserving their unique cultural heritage while also embracing change and diversity?

script.text: Do you think globalisation is eroding cultural traditions and local identities, or is it creating new and richer cultural forms?
How do you think communities can balance preserving their unique cultural heritage while also embracing change and diversity?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
